simple_types.name: Axis_Data
simple_types.code:
type Axis_Data is range -2 ** 9 .. 2 ** 9 - 1
  with Size => 10;

simple_types.name: Oversampling_Mode
simple_types.code:
type Oversampling_Mode is (Normal, Low_Noise_Low_Power,
                           High_Resolution, Low_Power);

record_types.name: All_Axes_Data

tagged_types.name: MMA8653_Accelerometer
tagged_types.code:
type MMA8653_Accelerometer (Port : not null Any_I2C_Port)
is tagged limited private;

documentation.description: Return False if device ID in incorrect or cannot be read

subprograms.name: Configure
